sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52338" key="kakoskh/nhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκο-σκήνης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n52338.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a bad, mean body,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.401</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crin.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
